Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Microscopes Can See Video on a LaserDisc 116 upvotes, 9 comments
  2. FrameBook 324 upvotes, 61 comments
  3. LibreOffice Writer now supports Markdown 243 upvotes, 46 comments
  4. Pushing and Pulling: Three reactivity algorithms 41 upvotes, 4 comments
  5. Artificial-life: A simple (300 lines of code) reproduction of Computational Life 32 upvotes, 3 comments
  6. Z80 Sans – a disassembler in a font (2024) 58 upvotes, 9 comments
  7. Blacksky AppView 47 upvotes, 7 comments
  8. Agent Safehouse – macOS-native sandboxing for local agents 164 upvotes, 40 comments
  9. What if the Apple ][ had run on Field-Sequential? 71 upvotes, 16 comments
  10. Every single board computer I tested in 2025 69 upvotes, 17 comments
  11. Notes on writing Rust-based Wasm 189 upvotes, 81 comments
  12. LLM Writing Tropes.md 309 upvotes, 142 comments
  13. Lil Finder Guy 38 upvotes, 12 comments
  14. I made a programming language with M&Ms 28 upvotes, 8 comments
  15. Show HN: I built a real-time OSINT dashboard pulling 15 live global feeds 118 upvotes, 55 comments
  16. An Analysis of User-Space Idle State Instructions on x86 Processors 9 upvotes, 1 comments
  17. Log messages are mostly for the people operating your software 87 upvotes, 41 comments
  18. Most of the US economy is in a recession 21 upvotes, 7 comments
  19. The changing goalposts of AGI and timelines 315 upvotes, 208 comments
  20. We should revisit literate programming in the agent era 68 upvotes, 38 comments
  21. Ask HN: Please restrict new accounts from posting 344 upvotes, 251 comments
  22. WSL Manager 54 upvotes, 33 comments
  23. Why can't you tune your guitar? (2019) 150 upvotes, 118 comments
  24. Ask HN: How to be alone? 190 upvotes, 156 comments
  25. SQG (SQL to Code Generator) Now with Java Streams and List Type Support 9 upvotes, 3 comments
  26. Living human brain cells play DOOM on a CL1 [video] 120 upvotes, 108 comments
  27. Show HN: Skir – like Protocol Buffer but better 49 upvotes, 38 comments
  28. My “grand vision” for Rust 90 upvotes, 81 comments
  29. My Homelab Setup 96 upvotes, 96 comments
  30. Detection Is Not Protection: What WAF Detection Mode Does (and Doesn't) 5 upvotes, 2 comments

Last generated 7:00am, 9 March 2026. Source here.
